prompt: Create a square cinematic fine-art photograph set in a dark, lush forest clearing, showing two pale young women with very long glossy black hair, their faces intentionally obscured by soft rectangular blur blocks for anonymity. The mood is surreal, intimate, and botanical, with natural dappled sunlight, deep green shadows, shallow depth of field, and a muted film-photography color grade. On the left, a standing woman with jet black hair is almost completely entwined in wild strawberry vines, leaves, tendrils, and many visible red strawberries growing across her hair, shoulders, chest, arms, and torso like a living garment; her hands rest low near her body. On the right, a second crouching or kneeling woman with the same long black hair reaches delicately toward the vines and appears to pick a strawberry, one hand raised near her face and the other extended toward the fruit. A thin strawberry vine stretches horizontally between both women at face height, with a small realistic bird perched on it near the center, pecking at or inspecting a red strawberry. Include exactly two human figures, exactly one bird, and numerous natural strawberry clusters with serrated green leaves. Use realistic anatomy, soft skin tones, wet-looking dark hair, organic vine tangles, woodland background bokeh, and a slightly eerie fairy-tale atmosphere. No text, no watermark, no extra people, no baskets, no modern objects.
